function solve(nums) {
    // Step 1: Collect the set of unique initial values, V.
    const V = new Set(nums);

    let totalMinSum = 0;

    // Step 3: For each x in nums, find d_x = min {d in V | d divides x}.
    for (const x of nums) {
        let d_min = x;

        // Find all divisors of x. Time complexity O(sqrt(x)).
        const limit = Math.floor(Math.sqrt(x));
        
        for (let i = 1; i <= limit; i++) {
            if (x % i === 0) {
                // i is a divisor
                const d1 = i;
                if (V.has(d1) && d1 < d_min) {
                    d_min = d1;
                }

                // x/i is also a divisor
                const d2 = x / i;
                
                // Avoid double counting if i*i = x
                if (d1 !== d2) {
                    if (V.has(d2) && d2 < d_min) {
                        d_min = d2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // d_min is the smallest achievable value for this element.
        totalMinSum += d_min;
    }

    return totalMinSum;
}
```
